scenes.text: Tus plantas limpian el aire y reducen el estrés.
scenes.media_query: A stylized 2D SVG animation of a lush green leaf (X:540, Y:960) centered in the canvas. The leaf starts as a small seed point and grows using an organic morphing transition with an 'elastic' easing curve. As it expands, small, glowing circular particles (radius 10px, color #4ade80) float upwards from the leaf's surface, representing purified air. These particles drift with a smooth 'ease-in-out' motion, fading out as they reach Y:400. A subtle, glowing aura (radius 200px, color #22c55e) pulses softly behind the leaf, pulsing from 20% to 80% opacity. The transition ends with the leaf gently swaying with a spring motion, representing serenity and stress reduction.

scenes.text: Cuidarlas es invertir en tu bienestar y tu entorno.
scenes.media_query: A 2D SVG composition featuring a central heart shape (X:540, Y:960) and a plant pot (X:540, Y:1200) connected by a rhythmic, glowing line. A small sprout shoots up from the pot with a 'bounce' effect, growing into a small plant with three distinct leaves. Simultaneously, a glowing circle (radius 150px, color #86efac) expands from the center of the center of the heart, creating a ripple effect with an 'ease-in-out' easing curve. As the plant grows, the heart pulses in sync with the heartbeat rhythm using a 'spring' motion. Gold-colored particles (radius 5px, color #fbbf24) orbit around the heart and the plant, connecting them with thin, elegant arcs that appear and fade using a linear fade-in/fade-out sequence.
